Categories.value: Circuit Zandvoort|2024 in Zandvoort|Aerial photographs of Zandvoort|Flickr images reviewed by FlickreviewR 2|Netherlands photographs taken on 2024-04-03|Files with coordinates missing SDC location of creation (52° N, 4° E)

ImageDescription.value: Aerial photography from KLM flights Lyon to Amsterdam and Amsterdam to Norwich. The unusual approach pattern was due to the closure of Schiphol's main East-West runway, necessitating the Lyon flight to fly all the way up the coast and then to land on the southerly Polderweg runway, giving great views of this part of Holland.
